title: Bug: API returns 500 error on empty payload
body: Getting a server error when the request body is empty. Happens consistently on the /predict endpoint. Logs show a NullPointerException in the request parser. Needs fix urgently.

title: New feature request: Add support for GCP Vertex AI batch predictions
body: We need to support batch prediction jobs on GCP Vertex AI. Currently only real-time inference is supported. This would allow large-scale offline scoring without keeping the endpoint warm.

title: Documentation missing for AWS S3 integration setup
body: The docs page for AWS S3 bucket configuration is incomplete. Missing sections on IAM role setup and cross-account access. New team members are blocked getting started.

comments.author: urooj
comments.text: I am looking into this and will update the docs page by end of week.

title: Question: How do I configure support tickets routing for mlc pipeline?
body: Having trouble understanding how the mlc support pipeline routes incoming tickets. Is there documentation on the routing logic? Need help understanding the priority tiers.

title: Fix: Model drift detected in production — ai service returning stale predictions
body: The ai service endpoint has been returning predictions based on the old model version since the last deployment. The model refresh job failed silently. Error logs show a timeout during model warm-up.

title: Bug: GCP Cloud Run deployment fails with permission denied error
body: Deploying to GCP Cloud Run throws a permission denied error on the service account. The service account has the Cloud Run Invoker role but is missing the Storage Object Viewer role for accessing the model artifacts.

comments.author: nithin
comments.text: Fixed by adding Storage Object Viewer role to the service account. Closing this issue.
